goals: Explore what unit conversion categories are available
Convert a weight measurement for a recipe
Convert a temperature for an outdoor event planning

user_agent_config.personality: Friendly and casual, enjoys sharing concert experiences but doesn't have technical expertise. Asks practical questions when planning activities.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows about music and concerts but has limited knowledge of unit conversion tools or technical APIs. Needs simple, practical conversions for everyday tasks.

end_condition: The user has successfully converted the needed measurements and can proceed with their recipe or event planning.
